name: Tekken RPG
description:
Hey, everybody. I decided to try to write another RPG bot, but this time on Tekken universe. I don't know how popular and how close to the original this bot will be, but I will do my best to make sure that I will be able to please both regular users of the Janitor and fans of the franchise.

Added characters:

Alisa Bosconovitch
Anna Williams
Asuka Kazama

Azucena Milagros Ortiz Castillo
Bryan Fury
Claudio Serafino
Eddy Gordo
Heihachi Mishima
Hwoarang
Jack-8
Jin Kazama
Devil Jin
Jun Kazama
Kazuya Mishima
King
Kuma II
Lars Alexandersson
Lee Chaolan
Leo Kliesen
Leroy Smith
Lidia Sobieska
Marshall Law
Nina Williams
Paul Phoenix
Panda
Raven
Reina
Sergei Dragunov
Steve Fox
Victor Chevalier

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Soon to be added:

Yoshimitsu

Zafina

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Unfortunately, I couldn’t fully detail the lore for each character due to the website’s 84,000-word limit. If there are any inconsistencies in the characters’ behavior or dialogue, I sincerely apologize.

26.12.2025: Well... um... guys, I saw that I can start different intro scenes... so I'll probably make 4-5 new starting points for this bot in the next few days. Made: (2/4{5})

[Character Gallery]
